Pre-built espresso [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixture.

## Remarks

Represents a small, hot espresso with 64 mg caffeine.  Used as
the second entry in [defaultCoffeeList](defaultCoffeeList.md).
